name: Ministry Archive
description: The records of a war lasting three hundred and thirty years fill, by your rough calculation, approximately the same volume as a small town. The filing system was designed by someone who had a very clear system and then died, and each subsequent archivist has added their own supplementary system to clarify the previous one, and the result is a palimpsest of methodology that tells you more about the institutional history of the Ministry than the files themselves. Things filed under W for War, filed again under C for Conflict, cross-referenced under E for Engagement and under H for History and under T for Terra and under O for Operations, and at the bottom of one of these chains, which you will find if you follow the right thread: the original. Everything you have been told about this war is here, which sounds like a thing that should be reassuring. The reason it isn't: very few of it has been filed under T for True.
